label: Innate T type1
evidence: Cell type label 'Innate T type1' is present in the fetal skin atlas annotations (Gopee et al., 2024) and corresponds to the 'type 1 innate T cell' annotation used by Suo et al. (2022) in the developing human immune system atlas. These are PLZF-expressing unconventional T cells with type 1 (IFN-gamma-producing) effector potential, arising via thymocyte-thymocyte selection.
